insight: the intervention is oracle-agnostic: pooled over 7 evaluated both-miss, a gold-free property gate catches 7/7 and reaches real completion 5/7 = 0.714, matching the regression-gated 0.769. The protocol effect comes from execution-based rejection plus a generalize-signal, not from access to the real tests. Property synthesis is stochastic (an instance can be sound in one run, unsound in another), so the evaluated set is pooled across runs
next_action: consolidate the completed detection+intervention arc into the submission-shaped paper; the remaining experimental frontier is raising property-derivability beyond format functions
